title: cornus multinervosa
intro: Cornus multinervosa, also known as the Chinese dogwood, is a species of flowering plant in the dogwood family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cornus multinervosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
